name: Strawberry-Kiwi Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups kiwi fruit, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the prepared fruits into a large bowl.
2. Measure the sugar and set aside.
3. Combine the Certo Light Fruit Pectin Crystals (no substitute) with 1/4 cup of the measured sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the pectin mixture to the fruit, stirring well until combined.
5. Let stand for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in the remaining sugar and continue to stir for 3 minutes until most of the sugar is dissolved.
7. Pour into clean jars or plastic containers. Cover with tight lids.
8. Allow to set at room temperature for up to 24 hours.
9. Store in the freezer or refrigerator for up to 3 weeks.
Makes 6 cups.
